title: anthurium amoenum var. humile
intro: Anthurium amoenum var. humile, also known as the small-flowered anthurium or miniature anthurium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Arum family (Araceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The plant's leaves and flowers contain medicinal compounds that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, including reduced stress and improved immune function. Anthurium amoenum var. humile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
